Rules.InvariantScript:
Switch(
    currentRole,

    "Volunteer",
        Navigate(VolunteerLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

    "Patrol Captain",
        Navigate(PatrolCaptainLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

    "Club Admin",
        Navigate(ClubAdminLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade)
)

Switch(
    currentRole,

    "Volunteer",
        Navigate(VolunteerLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

    "Patrol Captain",
        Navigate(PatrolCaptainLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

    "Club Admin",
        Navigate(ClubAdminLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade)
)

If(
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Ok",
    ColorValue("#166534"),
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Repair",
    ColorValue("#92400E"),
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Missing",
    ColorValue("#991B1B"),
    ColorValue("#374151")
)

If(
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Ok",
    ColorValue("#DCFCE7"),
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Repair",
    ColorValue("#FEF3C7"),
    ThisItem.CurrentStatus.Value = "Missing",
    ColorValue("#FEE2E2"),
    ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)

If(
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "North beach",
    ColorValue("#1D4ED8"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "Central Beach",
    ColorValue("#92400E"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "South Beach",
    ColorValue("#166534"),
    ColorValue("#374151")
)

If(
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "North beach",
    ColorValue("#DBEAFE"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "Central Beach",
    ColorValue("#FEF3C7"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "South Beach",
    ColorValue("#DCFCE7"),
    ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)

If(
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "North beach",
    ColorValue("#DBEAFE"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "Central Beach",
    ColorValue("#FEF3C7"),
    ThisItem.BeachSection.Value = "South Beach",
    ColorValue("#DCFCE7"),
    ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)

If(
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Rescue",
    ColorValue("#1D4ED8"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "First Aid",
    ColorValue("#991B1B"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Communication",
    ColorValue("#6D28D9"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Safety",
    ColorValue("#166534"),
    ColorValue("#374151")
)

If(
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Rescue",
    ColorValue("#1D4ED8"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "First Aid",
    ColorValue("#991B1B"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Communication",
    ColorValue("#6D28D9"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Safety",
    ColorValue("#166534"),
    ColorValue("#374151")
)

If(
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Rescue",
    ColorValue("#DBEAFE"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "First Aid",
    ColorValue("#FEE2E2"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Communication",
    ColorValue("#EDE9FE"),
    ThisItem.Category.Value = "Safety",
    ColorValue("#DCFCE7"),
    ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)

If(
    showEquipmentErrors && equipmentErrorID = ThisItem.ID,
    ColorValue("#DC2626"),
    ColorValue("#111827")
)
